verse.name: V1
verse.lines: We talk about heaven, We sing about theophanies How we want to change dimensions Lord how we long for our new bodies But there’s a price I must pay The cost is neither riches nor gold All I have is my life That I want You to mold

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: I'll give my life, I’ll pay the price Just to be close to You, Lord, Let me die Full surrender, I'm laying it all on the altar Just to be more like You I’ll pay the price

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Sweet Holy Spirit Come now and fill me And take away everything That You know would hinder me Though many times I’m weak in my body And I suffer so much pain All I want is to be completely Sold out to Him

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: For we know that in death there's a victory And it will be worth it all When we stand in glory So Lord take all of me
